app.title: What xAI's Grok build CLI sends to xAI: A wire-level analysis
app.author: jhoho
app.description: Analyzed what xAI's Grok build CLI sends to xAI at a wire-level.
proposed_tests: Measure the packet size and latency of the data sent to xAI
Verify the format of the data being sent by implementing a simple parser
Compare the performance of Grok build CLI with other xAI APIs
